DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SOLIDUS NETWORKS, INC. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Howard M. Garfield, Esq. of Long & Levit LLP (415) 397-2222, appearing for Defendant and moving party; J. Philip Martin, Esq. of Kastner Kim LLP (650) 967-7854, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Hearing held. Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff to specifically plead facts relied on that relate to the promises made, when the promises were made, who made the promises, the targets established, and the manner in which the parties were required to perform. Motion to strike denied. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Further Respond To First Sets Of Employment Form Interrogatories, General Form Interrogatories, And Document Requests, And To Produce Further Documents
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Luis V. Garcia, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Jon Siegal
Juan C. Araneda, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Solidus Networks, Inc. dba Pay by Touch

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Jon Siegal's Motion To Compel Defendant To Further Respond To discovery is denied in part, granted in part:
a. As to First Set Of Employment Form Interrogatories, motion denied;
b. As to General Form Interrogatory No. 9.2, motion denied;
c. As to General Form Interrogatories Nos. 50.2, 50.3, 50.4, 50.5, and 50.6, denied without prejudice to further, follow-up discovery;
d. As to Requests for Production Nos. 3 and 9, granted; defendant shall serve a verified, supplemental response identifying and producing any memos, email messages, correspondence or other documents not included in, or a part of plaintiff's personnel file;
e. As to Requests for Production No. 16 is denied without prejudice to redrafted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
